title: Better Place Bind
description: Allows you to use right click for place bind like normal but not lose out on the competitive advantage of using a keyboard key.
body:
### Disclaimer

- **NO, this is NOT an autoclicker. An autoclicker would mess up eating, block placing would be uncontrollable, XP bottles would be uncontrollable, charging anchors with just one glowstone would be a huge challenge and the list goes on.**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
In Minecraft, binding right click to place blocks/use items sucks. It feels delayed and slow compared to just holding a keyboard keybind for it, and that's because keyboard keys repeat at a much faster rate. That happens even when both binds are simply being held, not clicked.

The only way to counter this is by spam clicking right click, which you can only do if you have high CPS. But even then, you will still be slower than just holding a keyboard button. Another way is rebinding right click to a keyboard letter then using that letter in ur keybind. that would give the same effect but right clicking anywhere in your system would be broken

For example, when holding right click, you can go through a stack of XP bottles in about 12 seconds. But when holding a keyboard keybind, it only takes 3 seconds. That's much faster!


### - My mod fixes that
 
You can use XP at the same speed as a keyboard keybind.

You can place blocks at the same speed as a keyboard keybind.

You can crystal at the same speed as a keyboard keybind (skill dependent I'm bad for example, but still way faster than when using the vanilla mouse bind).

This is a QoL improvement if you build a lot.

Note: Make sure this mod is allowed on the servers you play on, although I don't think it will be flagged by anticheats (no promises!).
